title: Prehistoric Universe
description: A mod that adds a biome called Prehistoric Plains where prehistoric creatures will appear. (The mod is in beta)
body:
In an ambitious attempt to unravel the secrets of evolution, an advanced civilization carried out the most daring project of its time: The Great Prehistoric Resurrection. Through unimaginable biogenetic technology, they managed to revive species from every era of Earth's history. Everything was confined in a closed biome, an artificial reserve designed to preserve this impossible ecosystem.
But something went wrong.
Those responsible for the experiment… mysteriously disappeared. Beasts from a forgotten past, now free in a world that should never have existed.
Now, the Prehistoric Sanctuary is a place where history converged in chaos. Jurassic giants walk alongside Cenozoic mammals, and ancient plants have reclaimed the lands. What caused the downfall of this project?
The mod needs geckolib 1.20.1 4.4.2 and curios api 5.4.2 to work
